concerns.text: FR-003 mandates processing 1024x1024 images from 'ImageNet-1K and ChestX-ray14'. The tasks list (T005, T019, T021) only references ImageNet-1K and COCO. No task exists to implement the ChestX-ray14 evaluation required by the spec, leaving this functional requirement unimplemented.

FR-004 requires calculating metrics against a 'bilinearly upsampled 64x64 ground truth'. Tasks T019 and T021 implement processing 'without resizing' and comparing against 'native 1024x1024' images (per the plan's correction). No task exists to generate or compare against the specific upsampled baseline required by the spec.

SC-005 requires measuring statistical significance using a 'one-sample t-test'. Task T022 implements 'Spearman rank correlation' (for FR-006) and the plan explicitly rejects the one-sample t-test in favor of a 'paired t-test' or 'Wilcoxon'. No task exists to implement the one-sample t-test required by the spec's success criterion.

US-2 explicitly requires evaluation on 'ImageNet-1K and ChestX-ray14'. The tasks (T019) only reference ImageNet and COCO. The implementation scope in tasks does not cover the full evaluation scope defined in the user story.
